APPEARANCES: CHRISTOPHER J. HAYES, ESQUIRE (BOROWSKY & HAYES, 415.896.6800) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS. HOLLY A. SCHAITBERGER, ESQUIRE (BLEDSOE CATHCART, 415.981.5411) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.

Motion To Compel Participation In An Independent Medical Exam With Robert Ansel, M.D.; Joint Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination With Robert Ansel, M.D.
Off Calendar Apr-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Holly A. Shaitberger, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Strawberry village Retail LLC
Steven R. Myers, Esq., for defendant Bay Bread, LLC
Christopher J. Hayes, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Jill Canellakis

After hearing, Defendant Strawberry Village Retail LLC.'s motion to compel participation in an Independent Medical Exam with Robert Ansel, M. D. is Granted. Plaintiff Jill Canellakis shall submit to, and participate in, an independent medical examination with Dr. Robert Ansel on April 29, 2008, at 11:00 a.m. as more fully set forth in the Court's written order, as a condition of this order defendants shall produce Dr. Ansel for deposition on May 13, 2008, or as otherwise agreed by the parties. Parties to sumit order for signature. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
